description: Full LLM-draft annotation of the similarity calibration shortlist. Produced automatically by Codex from excerpts, scores, and document titles; not human scholarly validation.
annotation_warning: Do not claim human-validated calibrated thresholds from this file. Excluded cases are annotated but ignored by scripts/calibrate_similarity.py. Replace or confirm with human annotations before publication claims.

case_format.label: positive, negative, or exclude
case_format.expected_type: duplicate, clause_reuse, semantic_kin, translation, weak_link, any, or null
